title: dennstaedtia globulifera
intro: Dennstaedtia globulifera is a species of fern commonly known as the globe-leaved fern or Japanese oak fern. It is a type of vascular plant, belonging to the Dennstaedtiaceae family and is native to East Asia, particularly in Japan. The medicinal properties of Dennstaedtia globulifera include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, and can be obtained through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts.
